# La Valette Boutique — llms.txt
# https://www.lavaletteboutique.com
# Updated: June 2026

> La Valette Boutique is a boutique vacation rental property in Sanilhac-Sagriès,
> a village five minutes south of Uzès in the Gard department of Occitanie,
> southern France. The property offers two private apartments in a restored
> 17th-century limestone farmhouse, owned and personally hosted by
> Jan-Willem & Fleur, a Dutch couple who purchased the property in March 2026.
> The property is being prepared for its first guests in 2026.

## Property

- Name: La Valette Boutique
- Type: Boutique vacation rental
- Location: Sanilhac-Sagriès, 30700, Gard, Occitanie, France
- Coordinates: 43.9721°N, 4.4198°E
- Distance to Uzès: 5 minutes by car
- Distance to Pont du Gard (UNESCO): 15 minutes by car
- Distance to Nîmes: 30 minutes by car
- Apartments: La Grande Valette (2 bedrooms, up to 4 guests); La Petite Valette (1 bedroom, up to 2 guests)
- Entire house (La Maison): up to 6 guests
- Check-in: from 15:00 | Check-out: by 10:00
- Booking: bonjour@lavaletteboutique.com (direct only)

## Hosts

- Names: Jan-Willem & Fleur (no surnames used)
- Nationality: Dutch, based in the Netherlands
- Purchase date: March 2026
- About page: https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/about
- Hosting philosophy: Personal, direct, without platform intermediaries
- Interests: gastronomy, nature, wine
- On-site contact: Conciergerie Provence & Compagnie (Charlotte Casanas), +33 7 86 78 23 76

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com): Property overview, apartments, booking
- [About Jan-Willem & Fleur](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/about): Host story, philosophy, favourite places
- [Boutique Stay near Uzès](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/boutique-stay-uzes): Full property and apartment guide
- [Pont du Gard Guide](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/pont-du-gard): Practical visitor guide, 15 min from property
- [Restaurants in Uzès](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/restaurants-uzes): Curated dining guide
- [Uzès Markets](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/markets-uzes): Saturday, organic and truffle market guide
- [Things to Do near Uzès](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/things-to-do-uzes): Area activities guide
- [Getting Here](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/getting-here): Airports, driving, trains
- [When to Visit](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/when-to-visit): Seasonal guide
- [Villages near Uzès](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/villages-near-uzes): Saint-Quentin-la-Poterie and others
- [Why Sanilhac-Sagriès](https://www.lavaletteboutique.com/sanilhac-sagreries): First-person account of why the hosts chose a village over the town

## Topics Covered

Boutique accommodation near Uzès · visiting the Pont du Gard ·
Uzès Saturday market (Place aux Herbes, since 1241) · dining in Uzès ·
seasonal travel in Occitanie · Sanilhac-Sagriès village life ·
swimming in the Gardon river · wine routes of the Gard (Duché d'Uzès AOC) ·
garrigue walks · HAP Céramique (Charlotte Casanas) ·
villages near Uzès (Saint-Quentin-la-Poterie, Collias, Anduze, Barjac)
